behaviors.description: An image containing explicit content is flagged and held for review, not published.
behaviors.justification: wiring=yes ("flagged and held for review, not published"); real_infra=no (no explicit real queue/db/network requirement in the behavior text); model_judgment=yes ("image containing explicit content is flagged"); multi_step_agentic=no (single moderation decision path, not autonomous multi-step planning). Deterministic map => model_judgment=yes and multi_step_agentic=no => Agentic.
behaviors.test_description: Submit explicit-image samples and assert moderation output is flagged/held and never published.

behaviors.description: A text post containing hate speech is flagged regardless of obfuscation techniques (e.g., letter substitution, unicode lookalikes).
behaviors.justification: wiring=yes ("is flagged"); real_infra=no (no explicit infra dependency required by wording); model_judgment=yes ("hate speech ... regardless of obfuscation techniques"); multi_step_agentic=no (single classifier judgment, no orchestrated autonomous sequence). Deterministic map => Agentic.
behaviors.test_description: Run obfuscated hate-speech variants (leet/unicode lookalikes) and assert all are flagged.

behaviors.description: A post that passes both content checks is published rather than held or silently dropped.
behaviors.justification: wiring=yes ("passes both content checks is published rather than held or silently dropped"); real_infra=no (behavior text does not require real external infra); model_judgment=no (assertion is routing/plumbing after checks, not quality of model content understanding); multi_step_agentic=no. Deterministic map => Integration. Tie-break note: between Integration vs Agentic, quoted text supports plumbing-only assertion.
behaviors.test_description: Stub/force both checks to pass and assert publish path executes, with no hold/drop.

behaviors.description: The full moderation pipeline — image check, text check, publish decision — completes within 5 seconds of submission.
behaviors.justification: wiring=yes ("full moderation pipeline — image check, text check, publish decision"); real_infra=yes ("completes within 5 seconds" is an end-to-end performance SLA that typically depends on deployed infra/runtime characteristics); model_judgment=no (checks latency, not correctness of content interpretation); multi_step_agentic=no. Deterministic map => System.
behaviors.test_description: Execute end-to-end submissions under representative load and assert p95/p99 completion within 5s SLA.

behaviors.description: When the AI vision model is unavailable, image posts are queued for retry rather than auto-approved.
behaviors.justification: wiring=yes ("queued for retry rather than auto-approved"); real_infra=yes ("vision model is unavailable" + "queued for retry" implies outage handling and queueing behavior under real service conditions); model_judgment=no (focus is failure-path control flow, not semantic quality); multi_step_agentic=no. Deterministic map => System.
behaviors.test_description: Induce vision-model unavailability and verify posts enter retry queue and are never auto-approved.

behaviors.description: The moderation decision for a borderline image is consistent when the same image is submitted multiple times within a short window.
behaviors.justification: wiring=yes ("decision ... is consistent ... submitted multiple times"); real_infra=no (no explicit requirement for real external infra in wording); model_judgment=yes ("borderline image" consistency is about model output behavior/content judgment); multi_step_agentic=no (repeated single-step classifications, no autonomous multi-step planning). Deterministic map => Agentic.
behaviors.test_description: Replay identical borderline images in a short interval and assert stable moderation decisions across runs.
